# Web Development Stage Contracts

## Default sequence

```text
site-product-requirements-desk
  -> information-architecture-desk
  -> ux-ui-design-system-desk
  -> backend-integration-desk
  -> frontend-engineering-desk
  -> web-security-secops-desk
  -> accessibility-seo-desk
  -> web-performance-desk
  -> web-testing-qa-desk
  -> web-release-deployment-desk
  -> web-observability-desk
  -> web-maintenance-growth-desk
```

## Stage completion rule

Each stage must emit: source facts, decisions, artifact summary, updated packet fields, open questions, halt conditions, and next-stage readiness.

## Launch gate rule

Release-oriented workflows must explicitly pass, waive, or halt on product, IA/content, design, integration, security, accessibility/SEO, performance, QA, deployment/rollback, observability, and post-launch ownership gates.
